name: G-9 sync with operator registries: pr-source-add source_class financial-industry routes to finance-industry/ per §17 G-9
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-add.sh" --github acme/repo --id fin-pr --source-class financial-industry --tree "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s tree/finance-industry/fin-pr.yaml ] && echo finance_routed 1>&2
